description: As a hydrologist assessing surface water extent for a regional flood risk study, analyze the Landsat multispectral imagery at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1=SWIR1, band_2=NIR, band_3=Red, band_4=Green) in SNAP Desktop. Produce a water assessment including a binary water mask and a water confidence layer derived from green-to-NIR and green-to-SWIR normalized difference spectral indices. Save the analysis in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/analysis.dim and export the water assessment as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/
